div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-align: center;

span.span: 我们为什么要睡觉：释放睡眠与梦想的力量

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-align: left;

span.span: 睡眠是人类健康和长寿的基石

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: information-icon-font-family; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-align: center;

user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: 核心观点

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: 睡眠不是一种可有可无的奢侈品，而是非协商性的生物需求，是健康的三大支柱（睡眠、饮食、运动）中最重要的一环。长期睡眠不足正在引发一场全球性的健康危机。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: 是非协商性的！！！

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: 为什么这么说

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: 1. **免疫系统崩溃与癌症风险**

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 1：** 仅一晚只睡 4-5 小时，人体内**自然杀伤细胞（NK 细胞）**的活性就会下降 **70%**。NK 细胞是免疫系统的前线部队，负责识别并清除癌细胞和病毒感染细胞。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 2：** 世界卫生组织（WHO）已将**夜班工作**列为**可能的致癌因素**，其核心原因在于夜班工作导致的长期睡眠剥夺和生物钟紊乱。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 3：** 实验显示，睡眠不足的小鼠，其体内肿瘤的增大速度会快很多倍，证实了睡眠不足会加速癌细胞的增殖。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: 2. **心血管疾病与动脉硬化**

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 1：** 睡眠不足会引发**炎症反应**。研究发现，一夜不睡会增加炎症细胞，这是导致**动脉粥样硬化**的主要原因，从而增加心脏病和中风的风险。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 2：** 睡眠不足会使交感神经系统过度活跃，导致**血压升高**和**心率加快**，长期下来会损害血管内皮，加速心血管疾病的发生。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: 3. **代谢紊乱与糖尿病风险**

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 1：** 仅一周只睡 4-5 小时，健康年轻人的**血糖控制能力**就会下降到**糖尿病前期**的水平，表现为胰岛素敏感性降低。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(98, 7, 3); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 2：** 睡眠不足会增加**饥饿激素（Ghrelin）**的分泌，同时抑制**饱足激素（Leptin）**的分泌，导致食欲增加，尤其对高热量食物的渴望增加，是肥胖的重要驱动因素。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-align: left;

span.span: 睡眠药物是“假睡”

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

span.span: 核心观点

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

span.span: 许多常见的安眠药（如苯二氮卓类药物）并不能提供真正的自然睡眠，它们只是镇静剂，会严重干扰正常的睡眠结构。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

span.span: 科学论据：

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

span.span: 1. **睡眠药物的本质是镇静**

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 1：** 常见的安眠药（如 Ambien, Lunesta）属于**镇静催眠药**，它们的作用是**镇静**大脑，而不是诱导自然睡眠。它们无法产生正常的睡眠脑电波模式，尤其是缺乏对记忆巩固至关重要的**深度 NREM 睡眠**和 **REM 睡眠**。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 2：** 长期服用安眠药与更高的**死亡风险**和**癌症风险**相关联，这表明它们对健康的负面影响远超其带来的“睡眠”益处。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

span.span: 2. **认知行为疗法（CBT-I）是失眠的首选疗法**

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 1：** 针对失眠的**认知行为疗法（CBT-I）**被证明是治疗慢性失眠最有效的方法，其效果优于安眠药，且没有副作用。CBT-I 旨在解决导致失眠的潜在行为和认知因素。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(97, 50, 4); text-align: left;

user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-align: left;

span.span: 睡眠是学习、记忆和情绪的“超级充电站”

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: information-icon-font-family; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-align: center;

user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: 核心观点

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: 睡眠在认知功能中扮演着不可替代的角色，它不仅巩固记忆，还能调节情绪，激发创造力。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: 科学论据：

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: 1. **NREM 睡眠与记忆巩固**

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 1：** **非快速眼动睡眠（NREM）**，特别是其中的**睡眠纺锤波**（Sleep Spindles），被认为是将白天学习到的新事实和技能从短期记忆区（海马体）转移到长期存储区（大脑皮层）的关键机制。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 2：** 实验证明，在学习新知识后进行 **90 分钟的午睡**，可以显著刷新短期记忆，使大脑为接下来的学习做好准备。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: 2. **REM 睡眠与情绪疗愈和创造力**

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 1：** **快速眼动睡眠（REM）**被誉为**“隔夜疗法”**。在 REM 睡眠期间，大脑处理情绪记忆时，**去甲肾上腺素**（一种压力化学物质）的水平几乎为零，这使得大脑能够将痛苦的**情绪标签**从事件本身剥离，从而减轻心理创伤。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 2：** REM 睡眠在**程序性记忆**（如技能学习）和**情绪记忆**的整合中发挥重要作用，有助于将新信息与旧知识网络连接，提升**创造性解决问题**的能力。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: 3. **大脑的“清洁工”——胶淋巴系统**

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(96, 82, 5); text-align: left;

span.span: **论据 1：** 在深度睡眠期间，大脑中的**胶淋巴系统**（Glymphatic System）会变得高度活跃，将大脑细胞收缩 **60%**，以便让脑脊液冲刷大脑，清除白天积累的代谢废物，特别是与阿尔茨海默病相关的**β-淀粉样蛋白**。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; display: block; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-align: left;

span.span: 四、实用建议：马修·沃克的 12 条睡眠卫生法则
